**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jilin Jiqing Damping Material Co., Ltd. presents the profile of a deeply legacy (established 1992) automotive materials workshop that has completely ceased active production. AI recovery of its former names ('FAW Jiqing Brake Factory Joint Damping Board Factory' -> 'FAW Group Jiqing Damping Board Factory') reveals its historical identity as a direct, specialized supplier of asphalt-based damping (sound-deadening) materials for the First Auto Works (FAW) Group. Despite its 'Auto Parts Manufacturer' classification and a registered business scope covering 'automotive asphalt damping sheets', the critical metric confirms its demise: its 2024 insured employee count is exactly 0 (recovered via AI). Furthermore, its paid-in capital is a meager 368,900 RMB. Processing industrial asphalt into vehicle sound-deadening mats is a highly physical, often heavily polluting process requiring workers. With zero employees, this entity is definitively a dormant shell, having ceased its legacy FAW supply operations.
